TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wulai Nsgan Wulai o gaga Nsgan Sinpey su, kmpraan kana dxgal o 333.51 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 299.28 km², dxgal pmblxan o 19.98 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,931, sapah o 1,793, seejiq tnpusu 2,793 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 47%(Embgala). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Wulai o niqan 5 alang ni maxal 4. 4 o, Tampya(忠治 部落), Ulay , Lahaw , Tranan . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: wulai nsgan wulai o gaga nsgan sinpə su, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(əmbgala). nsgan alaŋ o səəɟiq klmukan ka pusu(ħbaɾaw) balaj. njusan qpaħan nsgan wulai o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, tampja(** **), ulaj , laħaw , tɾanan . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Wulai Nsgan Wulai o gaga Nsgan Sinpey su, kmpraan kana dxgal o 333.51 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 299.28 km², dxgal pmblxan o 19.98 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,931, sapah o 1,793, seejiq tnpusu 2,793 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 47%(Embgala). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Wulai o niqan 5 alang ni maxal 4. 4 o, Tampya(忠治 部落), Ulay , Lahaw , Tranan . pusupnyahan patas
